notes: Modern typed WR38 water-well borehole record form (Water Resources Act 1991), not a driller's journal. Page 1 is the header/site-details form: drilled for Durham History Centre at Mount Oswald Manor House, NGR NZ 26736 40656, drilling commenced and completed 09/06/2021, drilled 150 mm diameter 0.00 to 80 m, metal casing 203 mm 0.00 to 41 m; ground level box blank; no water-struck entries; no test-pumping data. Page 2 is the strata log: only three summary units for the whole 80 m hole, extremely coarse detail ('How long did it take you to fill in this form? 2 MINS'). Driller entered depth RANGES in the Thickness column and left the Depth column blank; depths and thicknesses here derived from those ranges as annotated — interval 1 reads '1-10' though drilling started at 0.00 m, leaving the first metre formally unaccounted. Page 3 is an aerial-photo location plan (Point E marker at Mount Oswald Manor House, South Road A177), no strata content. No pencil marginalia, no seam names, no coal encountered in the log as written.
